description: Draft, revise, and verify concise written outputs from explicit source notes.

verifier.method: claim-source map plus style and constraint checks
verifier.pass_signal: draft uses only supplied notes, names unsupported gaps, and satisfies the requested style constraints

mini_tasks.goal: Turn three source notes about Octopus into a short product paragraph and verify every claim against the notes.
mini_tasks.expected_feed: A concise paragraph, claim-source map, unsupported-gap list, style checks, and artifact-backed verifier evidence.

mini_tasks.goal: Summarize four source notes into a strict two-sentence writing brief and verify each claim against the notes.
mini_tasks.expected_feed: A strict two-sentence brief, claim-to-source map, explicit gap list, and artifact-backed verifier checks.
